title: CFOs are starting to question if AI usage is actually a benefit, says Wharton's Peter Cappelli
description: Peter Cappelli, ‘In Praise of the Officer’ co-author and professor of management at University of Pennsylvania’s Wharton School of Business, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss how AI is impacting the labor force.

title: Tripura to roll out India’s 1st state-level AI policy: Saha
description: Tripura has taken the lead in unveiling India’s first AI policy at the state level, introduced by Chief Minister Manik Saha.

title: Security experts flag multiple issues in Claude Code, warning, 'As AI integration deepens, security controls must evolve to match the new trust boundaries'
description: An AI assistant can quickly turn into a malicious insider, so be careful with permissions.

title: Nvidia Posts 75.2% Margin as $650 Billion AI Capex Looms
description: Adjusted gross margin hits highest since 2H 2024 as hyperscalers project 60% capex growth and supply tightness persists.

title: Samsung debuts Galaxy S26, S26+ and S26 Ultra with proactive AI and next-gen performance
description: Standing in the crowd at the Galaxy Unpacked on Wednesday in Lagos, it became clear that the conversation...The post Samsung debuts Galaxy S26, S26+ and S26 Ultra with proactive AI and next-gen performance first appeared on Technext.
